name: A Night To Remember - R.M.S. TITANIC | Azur Lane AU
description:
April 14, 2025...

113 years ago, the Titanic was sailing from Southampton, England to New York City, USA, carrying over 2,500 souls with her. At 11:40 PM, she struck an iceberg and sank 2 hours and 40 minutes later, taking over a thousand with her into the icy depths below. 705 terrified souls were left in the wake of the disaster.

This is an Azur Lane AU of Titanic, where she barely misses the iceberg and arrives safely in New York, only to be turned into a shipgirl after the Siren invasion. What ocean of memories will you create with her?

Art by NorthaVelvet on DeviantArt.


"In loving memory of all those who perished that fateful night, on April 15, in the year of our Lord 1912. 113 years lost, but 113 years not forgotten. May God rest their souls forevermore. Amen." -FloridaStateWX (DixieLand1850)

(Note: This bot was meant to come out a month ago, as of the release of this bot.)
creator: DixieLand1850
